future_remap_sequence.name: Passive/skill identity-only remap where safe

gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.description: Production BuildStats uses fixed Python/TypeScript fields while v2 has canonical stat IDs.
gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.impact: Needs an audited stat field adapter before planner math can consume v2 modifiers.

gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.description: Many v2 modifier rows preserve raw source units.
gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.impact: Planner-normalized values must not be inferred without scale evidence.

gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.description: Unique, passive, and skill records include scripted/text-only mechanics.
gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.impact: These must remain display/debug-only until explicitly modeled.

gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.description: A small number of class/mastery skill references remain unresolved or ambiguous.
gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.impact: Skill ownership-sensitive calculations cannot depend on those links.

gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.description: Production reference routes still use legacy DB/static sources.
gaps_between_current_planner_and_v2.impact: Route-level remap requires compatibility wrappers and regression fixtures.

hardcoded_and_legacy_data_sources.finding: CLASS_META and slot aliases are hardcoded production reference metadata.
Legacy runtime constants consumed by stat and combat engines.
Legacy JSON and DB loader for affixes, blessings, and reference data.
Manual BuildStats field schema and stat aggregation mappings.
Manual layer ordering and blessing stat conversion.

production_inventory.scan_note: Static inventory only; future remap phases need behavioral golden tests before production switching.

legacy versus v2 dry-run comparison fixtures
combat/stat output parity tests before any consumption
source contracts or golden baselines for every promoted family
guards that unresolved/ambiguous refs remain blocked
tests that text-only/scripted behavior never enters stable math
frontend debug and route envelope compatibility tests
